variables.name: typography/family/primary
variables.description: Body face: Satoshi (ITF). Self-hosted from /public/fonts/satoshi/. Replaces Clash Grotesk for better small-size legibility (open apertures, larger x-height). Falls back to system-ui sans-serif stack.

variables.name: typography/family/display
variables.description: Display face: Clash Display ITF, bound to display/h1/h2/h3 composites.

variables.name: typography/family/mono
variables.description: Monospace face: Geist Mono. Falls back to Courier New, monospace.

variables.name: typography/size/7xl
variables.description: Swiss-canon display size. Static desktop value; fluid in theme.css.

variables.name: typography/weight/light
variables.description: Swiss-canon heading weight. Display and h1/h2 composites only.

variables.name: typography/lineHeight/snug
variables.description: Swiss-canon snug rhythm (10t-5). Used by h2/h3 composites for tight-but-readable heading lines.

variables.name: typography/lineHeight/relaxed
variables.description: Swiss-canon relaxed rhythm (10t-5). Used by body/small/mono composites for long-form prose comfort.

variables.name: typography/letterSpacing/caps
variables.description: All-caps tracking for eyebrow / kicker labels. Always pairs with text-transform: uppercase.

variables.description: Fixed elapsed time interval in milliseconds.

variables.description: Fixed elapsed time interval in milliseconds.

variables.name: easing/decelerate
variables.description: Cubic bezier with steep initial gain and constrained tail velocity.

variables.name: easing/accelerate
variables.description: Cubic bezier with restrained initial gain and steep terminal velocity.

variables.description: HSL channels for shadow-color alpha compositing. Light: cool neutral; dark: black.

variables.description: 1px border offset and hairline spacing.

variables.description: 2px vertical rhythm nudge and baseline adjustment.

variables.name: space/subgrid/gap
variables.description: 4px cap-height and inline cluster spacing.

variables.name: space/component/gap
variables.description: 8px label↔input rhythm and closely coupled control spacing.

variables.name: space/component/medium
variables.description: 12px adjacent form fields and medium intra-component gaps.

variables.name: space/component/padding
variables.description: 24px default inset for cards, forms, panels, and grouped surfaces.

variables.name: space/layout/tight
variables.description: 16px default HdsStack gap and inter-component spacing.

variables.name: space/layout/normal
variables.description: 24px column gutters and sidebar gutter spacing.

variables.name: space/layout/gutter
variables.description: 24px column and region gutters (alias for layout.normal).

variables.name: space/layout/inset
variables.description: 32px major block separation and inset inter-component gaps.

variables.name: space/layout/spacious
variables.description: 48px section break and whitespace separator between major content blocks.

variables.name: space/section/stack
variables.description: 80px vertical rhythm between page sections and major editorial blocks.

variables.name: space/section/inset
variables.description: 96px hero and landing-page inset padding.

variables.name: space/section/heroMax
variables.description: 128px maximum hero region padding for extra-large displays.

variables.name: space/sidebar/indent
variables.description: 12px indent level for nested sidebar and TOC groups.

variables.name: space/sidebar/gap
variables.description: 16px vertical spacing between items in sidebar and TOC stacks.

variables.name: space/sidebar/sectionGap
variables.description: 12px spacing between sidebar sections and grouped rail blocks.

variables.name: space/sidebar/railPadding
variables.description: 20px outer padding for sidebar and TOC rails.

variables.name: layout/width/content
variables.description: Max width for prose/content (760px). Use with HdsContainer for centered text blocks.

variables.name: layout/width/max
variables.description: Max width for full-layout containers (1200px). Use with HdsContainer for page layouts.

variables.name: typography/lineHeight/none
variables.description: Semantic alias for leading-none (1). Display text and badge spans.

variables.name: docs/space/section
variables.description: 48px between H2 sections — generous section break for doc pages.

variables.name: docs/space/paragraph
variables.description: 24px between paragraphs — comfortable prose rhythm for long-form doc content.

variables.name: docs/space/inline
variables.description: 8px inline cluster spacing — gap between metadata badges, inline icons, doc-page chips.

variables.name: typography/ui/font-family
variables.description: UI / secondary running text: nav, form labels, sidebars, table cells, footnotes, image captions. 15px / Satoshi medium 500 / line-height 24px (integer-pixel snap; was 1.625 ratio = 24.375px fractional). Sentence case only — never uppercase.

variables.name: typography/ui/font-size
variables.description: UI / secondary running text: nav, form labels, sidebars, table cells, footnotes, image captions. 15px / Satoshi medium 500 / line-height 24px (integer-pixel snap; was 1.625 ratio = 24.375px fractional). Sentence case only — never uppercase.

variables.name: typography/eyebrow/font-family
variables.description: Eyebrow / kicker label. 13px / Satoshi medium 500 / tracking-caps (+0.06em) / line-height 20px (integer-pixel snap; was 1.5 ratio = 19.5px half-pixel) / UPPERCASE (baked into the token). Pre-title metadata, section overlines, badge labels — never sentences, never inline within prose.

variables.name: typography/mono/font-family
variables.description: Monospace: code, token names, keyboard shortcuts. 13px / Geist Mono regular 400 / line-height 20px (integer-pixel snap; was 1.625 ratio = 21.125px fractional). Sits one ramp step below body to compensate for mono's optical heaviness. Stays at 400, exempt from the 500-only Satoshi/Clash rule.

variables.name: typography/mono/font-size
variables.description: Monospace: code, token names, keyboard shortcuts. 13px / Geist Mono regular 400 / line-height 20px (integer-pixel snap; was 1.625 ratio = 21.125px fractional). Sits one ramp step below body to compensate for mono's optical heaviness. Stays at 400, exempt from the 500-only Satoshi/Clash rule.
